sentence: וְהָיוּ לִמְאוֹרֹת בִּרְקִיעַ הַשָּׁמַיִם לְהָאִיר עַל־הָאָרֶץ וַיְהִי־כֵן

grammatical-notes.לְהָאִיר: Preposition + Hiphil Infinitive. 'To cause to shine' or 'to illuminate'.

dictionary-meaning.לְהָאִיר: To illuminate the physical world — disclosing the Hiphil causative infinitive of 'or' (Rule 9).

main-translation: ***'And let them exist as light-bearing regulators within the hammered-out expanse of the skies to illuminate the material foundation of the physical world'***; ***and it was established as a fixed and stable reality.***

main-translation-explanation.to illuminate the material foundation: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the Hiphil infinitive as a causative purpose (Rule 9).

rejected-translations.reason: Thin; fails to disclose the causative illumination of the Hiphil stem.
